evidence.raw_text:
e | July 2014
To
All Protectors of Emigrants

Subject: Submission of Employment Contract signed by both Foreign Employer (FE)
and intending emigrant* and countersigned by the Recruiting Agent (RA) —
revision of eWakala instructions
evidence.clean_text: The RA also submits that he takes full responsibility of the content of the documents submitted by him and that he would be responsible for all consequences arising thereof in case his submissions are found to be false or incorrect.
